steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of Nokia dividend withholding from 13.5% to 15% under FI-NO treaty
Submit Vero Form 6163e/6167e refund application for EUR 3,607.50 overpaid Finnish withholding tax
Provide Nordea with Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty rate documentation
Follow up with both custodian and Finnish tax authority within 30 days for expedited processing

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
